_comment: Data for check-conflicts.mjs. Names are normalized (lowercase, no separators, version stripped) and matched by inclusion both ways. Conservative on purpose: only well-established overlaps/deps. Severity: critical (won't start / data loss) > high > medium > low. Verify with learn-plugin-docs before acting.

mutuallyExclusive.note: Two skyblock engines fight over island worlds/data. Pick one.
Multiple land/claim systems overlap and confuse protection. Pick one primary claim plugin (WorldGuard regions can coexist for admin areas).
Two resource-pack/custom-item engines (ItemsAdder, Oraxen, Nexo, CraftEngine) fight over the generated pack and self-host port. Run one.
EssentialsX and CMI both provide homes/spawn/kits/economy; running both double-binds commands. Choose one core.
Multiple chat formatters compete for the chat event; pick one to keep formatting/MiniMessage consistent.
Two anti-cheats double-process movement/combat and cause false flags + overhead. Run one.
Multiple hologram plugins work but are redundant; consolidate to one.
Multiple web-map renderers each render the world (CPU/disk). One is usually enough.

pairs.note: Geyser + Floodgate are normally paired so Bedrock players join without a Java account.
ViaBackwards needs ViaVersion; ViaVersion alone supports newer clients only. Add ViaBackwards for older clients.

requires.note: Vault is an API bridge with no economy of its own; without an economy provider /balance and shop plugins have nothing to talk to.
DeluxeMenus uses PlaceholderAPI for %placeholders% in menus (optional but expected).

foliaAdvisory: Folia detected: every plugin must declare folia-supported: true or it will fail to load. Verify each against its docs (learn-plugin-docs); most legacy plugins are not Folia-ready in 2026.
